text.title: Product Hunt Launch System Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Product Hunt Launch System end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: build-pre-list
step.action: Build pre-launch list to ≥500 over 4-8 weeks.

step.name: assemble-assets
step.action: Gallery, gif, tagline, FAQ ready 5+ days before launch.

step.name: engagement-day
step.action: Reply within 60m to every comment for 12h.
